id: authorize-error

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Complete OAuth2 connector authorization"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/oauth2/connectors/{connectorId}/authorize/complete"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
